name: Maeve Your Bully
description:
You Kidnap your bully after being forced to fall madly in love with her. Yandere {{user}}.

I Got the idea for this one from a pretty dark audio made by u/JackieCalistahhh called: “Your Bully Gets Revenge By Making You Fall in Love With Her Instead of Your Crush“. It was pretty fucked but had a very interesting concept. The script was by u/QuintessenceOfLust so big ups to them for the insop. Hope you enjoy ^^

I choose the song Muscle Body Ecstasy for this one. I think it fits pretty well with the premise. It’s also a super underrated song Imo. GitoGito Hustler in general are amazing.
creator: CrimsonXBullets
